name: fablever
description: A zero-dependency working-style + discipline layer for Claude Code AND Codex CLI: scope control, evidence-grounded completion, and deterministic delivery checks. Claude Code via output style + hooks + MCP; Codex CLI via AGENTS.md + hooks + MCP + on-demand Agent Skills. PLUS an experimental orchestration layer (runnable Workflow recipes for independent review, divergent exploration, decompose-and-fan-out). A style/structure transplant, not a capability transplant.
author: elon-choo (https://github.com/elon-choo)

scripts.test: node test/mcp-test.js && node test/fusion-test.js && node test/orchestration-test.js && node test/orchestration-runtime-test.js && node test/model-test.mjs && node test/update-check-test.mjs && node orchestration/lib/xverify-preset.mjs --selftest && node eval/ultra/score.mjs && node eval/unsupported-claim-regression/run.mjs && node test/install-mjs-test.mjs && node test/run-install-test.mjs && node test/install-matrix.mjs && node test/codex-install-test.mjs && node test/codex-skills-test.mjs && node test/measurement-assignment-test.mjs && node test/codex-campaign-test.mjs && node test/measurement-stats-test.mjs && node test/codex-ab-runner-test.mjs && node test/codex-ab-score-test.mjs && node test/privacy-canary/run.mjs
scripts.test:measure: node test/measurement-assignment-test.mjs && node test/codex-campaign-test.mjs && node test/measurement-stats-test.mjs
